---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature, task, or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

<!--
Thanks for the idea! For larger changes, consider opening a Discussion first so
we can coordinate before code is written:
https://github.com/KingshotAuto/Kingshot-bot/discussions
-->

## Problem / motivation

What problem are you trying to solve? What's frustrating, missing, or could work better? (e.g. "Task X doesn't exist", "Template matching breaks at non-default resolutions".)

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature or change you'd like to see. If it's a new automation task, mention which in-game action it should perform.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches or workarounds you've thought about.

## Additional context

Add any other context, mockups, screenshots, or references here. If you're willing to work on this yourself, let us know!
